title: Iran Handwoven Carpet Export Value/Volume, Post-1990 — compiled from news reporting on Iran National Carpet Center data
source_org: Multiple: Radio Farda (RFE/RL), Iran International, Tehran Times, tradingeconomics.com/UN Comtrade, farahancarpet.com; all ultimately attributing figures to Iran's National Carpet Center or UN Comtrade
extraction_method: MANUAL COMPILATION from web article text, fetched via WebFetch (radiofarda.com required the Claude Browser tool instead, as WebFetch returned HTTP 403). No PDF/scan involved; all figures are journalistic citations of official Iran National Carpet Center or UN Comtrade data, transcribed verbatim with the citing outlet recorded per row. Tehran Times is Iranian state media -- labeled per row and cross-check-noted per docs/bookkeeping.md source-reliability rule 4. No FAOSTAT overlap: FAOSTAT's crops/livestock trade file does not track carpets (confirmed via grep, zero matches).
time_coverage: 1994-2025 (non-continuous; only years with a directly cited figure are included)
frequency: annual, non-continuous, plus two quarterly/11-month data points explicitly labeled as such
units: mixed: million USD (value), tonnes (volume) -- see unit column per row; several rows are sub-annual (Q2, 11-month) and explicitly flagged, do not treat as annual totals
license_terms: News-article content; used here for factual data-point citation with full source attribution per row, consistent with fair-use/citation norms for a research database.
notes: Narrative arc corroborated across independent outlets: 1994 peak ($2.132bn) -> collapse under 2010s sanctions -> brief post-JCPOA (2015 deal) recovery peaking 2017 ($426M) -> renewed collapse after US withdrawal from JCPOA in 2018 and re-imposed sanctions -> low tens-of-millions USD by 2019-2025. One internal inconsistency flagged in notes column (2018 figure: $238M per Radio Farda/official data vs $430M per a less-precise secondary source) -- both are reported as-is, Radio Farda's figure preferred as primary since it explicitly cites official per-year data. This dataset intentionally does NOT include Encyclopaedia Iranica's 1948-1988 figures, which are captured separately in the sibling dataset iran-carpet-exports/iranica-carpet-export-narrative-series-1960-1988/ to keep source-type (primary encyclopedia narrative vs. compiled news reporting) separated per dataset.
failures: Could not obtain a complete unbroken annual series 1995-2016 (the intervening 'sanctions decade' years) from freely accessible sources within this session; only headline/peak/trough years were reported by the outlets found. Iran National Carpet Center's own site was not directly queryable/found with a clean historical table.
